Year: The year in which the sales data was recorded.
Sales_Model: The sales model followed for the electric vehicles sold. For this insight, it is the 'Dealership' model.
Total_Revenue: The total revenue generated from the sales of electric vehicles under the specified sales model in the given year.
Total_Customers: The total number of customers who purchased electric vehicles under the specified sales model in the given year.
Average_Revenue_Per_Customer: The average revenue generated per customer under the specified sales model in the given year. This is calculated by dividing the 'Total_Revenue' by 'Total_Customers'.
